CLARIN·DARIAH / UK
PROGRAMME SPEAKERS VENUE ABOUT REGISTER
BRIGHTON, UK  //  02.10.2026

Programme

A single day of talks, panels and lightning sessions on the infrastructures behind research. The full schedule will be published here — this is the shape it will take.
